name: Beer Steamed Sausages
recipeIngredient: 1 can Beer, room temp (any brand or type)
Smoked sausage - enough to fill crock pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each pound of smoked sausage into 4 pieces.
2. Pour the beer in the bottom of the crock pot.
3. Place the sausage on top of the beer.
4. Cook on HIGH for 2 hours.
5. Switch to LOW and continue cooking until ready to serve.
Those who prefer a stronger beer flavor will want the pieces that actually bathed in the beer, while those toward the top of the crock pot will have a more delicate beery tang. The alcohol in the beer will evaporate completely during cooking, ensuring all can enjoy these sausages safely.
